products.title: Mabuhay | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Whatever happened at the Fab Mab stayed at the Fab Mab. The Mabuhay is a classic wire frame aviator design. We have added rubber texture to the temple tips to secure these frames to your face in times of gravitational diversity. The lens has a slight color tint, depending on which model you can’t live without.

products.description: Whatever happened at the Fab Mab stayed at the Fab Mab. The Mabuhay is a classic wire frame aviator design. The lens has a slight color tint, depending on which model you can’t live without.

products.title: Shelby | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Get your daily dose of V8. Sometimes a situation calls for Frank Zappa, or blue velvet, or a big-ass sundae. Sometimes you’ve gotta de-Kondo. Sometimes more is more. Shelby’s square, slightly oversized frames are just enough to make some noise without being a full-blown attention burglar.

It’s an oversized frame shaped by seduction, heartbreak, tequila, and songs that only sound better the later it gets. Bold, expressive, and never trying to be subtle, Chavela shows up exactly as it is.

D28 is a hearty helping of precision-cut, 100% acetate with “Izquierda” and “Derecha” laser-etched across the top if you forget which side is left and which is right.

products.title: D28 Compact | Custom Light Responsive Progressive Glasses
products.description: Hits you like a ton of bricks. For those fans of substance, this frame will not fold four different ways into a square the size of a Starburst. D28 is a hearty helping of precision-cut, 100% acetate with “Izquierda” and “Derecha” laser-etched across the top if you forget which side is left and which is right.

products.title: Bixby | Reading Glasses
products.description: Meet Bixby, the bold statement condensed into a smaller package. Bixby is designed with the same DNA as other Caddis favorites, yet still, its own animal and designed for slightly smaller faces.

products.title: Miklos | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Track One from our greatest hits album. People with larger faces like the thickness and solid feel of Miklos. Customers with smaller faces like wearing a frame that stands out. Engraved over the left eye is “Port,” and over the right eye is “Starboard.” It’s a boat thing. Not a yacht thing.

products.title: Root Cause Analysis | Reading Glasses
products.description: See the evidence-based data forest through the systematic trees. The Root Cause Analysis is a high-density acetate frame, which means it’s created from the good, expensive stuff. The time-tested aviator shape originates back to a date that the Internet is just not letting up that easily…but trust us when we say, “timeless.”

products.title: Caddis x André is an Idiot Miklos | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Meet our friend Andre Ricciardi and his big beautiful documentary about living, dying, cancer, and his attempt to scrape DNA off of Kim Kardashian's pants. Funny, sad, defiant, and truly one of a kind, Caddis is honored to play along in the award-winning "Andre is an Idiot" journey. Go see this film. Get your butt checked.

products.title: Shelby | Zeiss LightPro Sunglasses
products.description: Get your daily dose of V8. Sometimes a situation calls for Frank Zappa, or blue velvet, or a big-ass sundae. Sometimes you’ve gotta de-Kondo. Sometimes more is more. Shelby’s square, slightly oversized frames are just enough to make some noise without being a full-blown attention burglar.

products.title: Nepetalactone | Zeiss LightPro Sunglasses
products.description: Like your Oma wore while her dance card filled up full. Inspired by roller derby queens who are not afraid to body check as they take a curve, meet Nepetalactone. Light in weight but not a lightweight.

products.title: Dogleg | Zeiss LightPro Sunglasses
products.description: This means something. You can get glad in the same pants you get mad in. Same goes for glasses too, as far as you know. Dogleg’s classic round orbitals contrast with angular geometry for a refresh on a vintage take.

We have added rubber texture to the temple tips to secure these frames to your face in times of gravitational diversity. The lens has a slight color tint, depending on which model you can’t live without.

products.title: Metamodernist Scout | Zeiss LightPro Sunglasses
products.description: Like vintage leather pants for your face. We’ve dipped these lenses in a steamy bath that is one part Chrysler Cordoba and one part Pam Grier. The end result is an orchestrated visual representation of that exact moment when Burt met Sally and we all dreamed a little dream of Trans-Ams and escaping the law.

products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: Barry Silver Origami Case
products.description: Barry Silver is a self taught artist, spiritual seeker, and world traveler. Having only a laptop computer to work during his travels prompted a new creative voyage into digital collage. Most often exploring self portraiture, Barry also enjoys incorporating friends and clients into these psychologically playful and spiritually insightful images.

products.title: Neta | Prescription Light Responsive Progressive Sunglasses
products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: D28 | Custom Sunglass Readers

Muzzy is a bold sturdy frame that will sit on any face...wait...that didn't come out right.

products.title: D28 | Prescription Light Responsive Sunglasses

products.title: Adult Themes Tote

products.title: Mirrored Hat
products.description: This 5-panel cotton twill hat came to us as we were staring in the mirror and photographing hats....hence the name. It has a snap back and comes in the best color we could choose from...Navy. The fit is more "structured" then some of the other Caddis hats so if that's what you're vibe is, well here you go.

products.title: Creative Director Hat
products.description: The position is always open and now with a simple purchase of a hat you can voice your opinion and steer the ship from the cheap seats. Make the logo bigger? Want to use Comic Sans in all of it's glory ? But first you have to buy the hat. Classic foam trucker hat with snap back for adjustment.

products.title: Script Los Angeles Hat
products.description: The 6-panel low profile cotton twill hat features the now almost famous script logo with a shout out to the Los Angeles store. These sit lower on your head and form to your cabeza in a really comfortable way. Adjustment buckle in the back.

products.title: Script NYC Hat
products.description: The 6-panel low profile cotton twill hat features the now almost famous script logo with a shout out to the NYC store. These sit lower on your head and form to your cabeza in a really comfortable way. Adjustment buckle in the back.

products.title: Small Time Hat
products.description: This 100% cotton corduroy hat features a low profile 6-panel design. Low profile hats sits lower on your head and are unconstructed for a closer fit. This one has a a simple, understated "Caddis" logo for all you quiet luxury fans out there playing along at home. Velcro back closure for a perfect fit.

products.title: Neta | Custom Light Responsive Sunglass Readers
products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: Miklos | Custom Light Responsive Sunglass Readers
products.description: Track One from our greatest hits album. People with larger faces like the thickness and solid feel of Miklos. Customers with smaller faces like wearing a frame that stands out. Engraved over the left eye is “Port,” and over the right eye is “Starboard.” It’s a boat thing. Not a yacht thing.

products.title: Dohbro | Custom Light Responsive Reading Glasses
products.description: Just duet. It could’ve been a train wreck. Or it could’ve been fine, but failed to transcend “two performances in one piece.” Dohbro is an interplay of traditional aesthetic and edgier-than-average geometry. And the sum is hall-of-fame greatness.

products.title: D28 Large | Custom Light Responsive Sun Progressives
products.product_type: Custom Light Responsive Progressive Sunglass Readers
products.description: Hits you like a ton of bricks. For those fans of substance, this frame will not fold four different ways into a square the size of a Starburst. D28 is a hearty helping of precision-cut, 100% acetate with “Izquierda” and “Derecha” laser-etched across the top if you forget which side is left and which is right.

products.title: Bandit | Custom Light Responsive Progressive Glasses
products.description: For the money, for the glory, and for the fun…mostly for the money. There was no waiting for home video. Sitting in a theater with sticky floors and a vintage gum collection under the seat along with everyone else was the only option. Bandit features custom metal alloy throughout with acetate orbitals, a laser-welded double nose bridge, hypoallergenic polypropylene temple tips and heavy-duty hinge

products.title: Muzzy | Prescription Sunglasses
products.description: Never lost a science fair or a beauty contest. The Muzzy takes on some new angles where other angles feared to tread. It was time to dust off the protractor and get our obtuse, acute, and right-angle muscles back from the Cortizone shots received earlier this month. Muzzy is a bold sturdy frame that will sit on any face...wait...that didn't come out right.

products.title: Bixby Compact | Custom Light Responsive Progressive Glasses
products.description: Meet Bixby, the bold statement condensed into a smaller package. Bixby is designed with the same DNA as other Caddis favorites, yet still, its own animal and designed for slightly smaller faces.

products.title: Velma | Reading Glasses
products.description: Dinkley, definitely not dinky. These sculpted frames feature a unique form factor with faceted edges and intentionally hard curves. Classical styling and clean lines meet sturdy, adjustable detailing—there’s no mystery or optical illusion here, just solid good looks. Case closed.

products.title: Neta | Tinted Reading Glasses
products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: Metamodernist Scout | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Like vintage leather pants for your face. We’ve dipped these lenses in a steamy bath that is one part Chrysler Cordoba and one part Pam Grier. The end result is an orchestrated visual representation of that exact moment when Burt met Sally and we all dreamed a little dream of Trans-Ams and escaping the law.

products.title: Dohbro | Custom Light Responsive Sun Progressives
products.product_type: Custom Light Responsive Progressive Sunglass Readers
products.description: Just duet. It could’ve been a train wreck. Or it could’ve been fine, but failed to transcend “two performances in one piece.” Dohbro is an interplay of traditional aesthetic and edgier-than-average geometry. And the sum is hall-of-fame greatness.

products.title: Birdcage | Reading Glasses
products.description: Subtlety is not an option. Cage in name, not in style. Birdcage gives a classic nod with cleverly constructed lenses that float within an intertwined frame for a three-dimensional look. Let your freak flag fly.

products.title: Birdcage | Reading Glasses
products.description: Subtlety is not an option. Cage in name, not in style. Birdcage gives a classic nod with cleverly constructed lenses that float within an intertwined frame for a three-dimensional look. Let your freak flag fly.

products.title: Neta | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: Dogleg | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: This means something. You can get glad in the same pants you get mad in. Same goes for glasses too, as far as you know. Dogleg’s classic round orbitals contrast with angular geometry for a refresh on a vintage take.

products.title: Metamodernist Scout | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Like vintage leather pants for your face. We’ve dipped these lenses in a steamy bath that is one part Chrysler Cordoba and one part Pam Grier. The end result is an orchestrated visual representation of that exact moment when Burt met Sally and we all dreamed a little dream of Trans-Ams and escaping the law.

products.description: Whatever happened at the Fab Mab stayed at the Fab Mab. The Mabuhay is a classic wire frame aviator design. The lens has a slight color tint, depending on which model you can’t live without.

products.title: Nepetalactone | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Like your Oma wore while her dance card filled up full. Inspired by roller derby queens who are not afraid to body check as they take a curve, meet Nepetalactone. Light in weight but not a lightweight.

products.title: Birdcage | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Subtlety is not an option. Cage in name, not in style. Birdcage gives a classic nod with cleverly constructed lenses that float within an intertwined frame for a three-dimensional look. Let your freak flag fly.

products.title: Birdcage | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Subtlety is not an option. Cage in name, not in style. Birdcage gives a classic nod with cleverly constructed lenses that float within an intertwined frame for a three-dimensional look. Let your freak flag fly.

products.title: Bandit | Sunglasses
products.description: For the money, for the glory, and for the fun…mostly for the money. There was no waiting for home video. Sitting in a theater with sticky floors and a vintage gum collection under the seat along with everyone else was the only option. Bandit features custom metal alloy throughout with acetate orbitals, a laser-welded double nose bridge, hypoallergenic polypropylene temple tips and heavy-duty hinge

products.title: Muzzy | Custom Light Responsive Sun Progressives
products.product_type: Custom Light Responsive Progressive Sunglass Readers
products.description: Never lost a science fair or a beauty contest. The Muzzy takes on some new angles where other angles feared to tread. It was time to dust off the protractor and get our obtuse, acute, and right-angle muscles back from the Cortizone shots received earlier this month. Muzzy is a bold sturdy frame that will sit on any face...wait...that didn't come out right.

products.title: Muzzy | Custom Light Responsive Sunglass Readers
products.description: Never lost a science fair or a beauty contest. The Muzzy takes on some new angles where other angles feared to tread. Muzzy is a bold sturdy frame that will sit on any face...wait...that didn't come out right.

products.title: Hooper | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Last seen in a gas line in 1973. Hooper is a lightweight frame design that slides on like sand through the hourglass. Choose the perfect lens tint for jumping cars over river gorges…but to be clear, that has nothing to do with the naming of this product.

products.title: D28 | Reading Glasses
products.description: Hits you like a ton of bricks. For those fans of substance, this frame will not fold four different ways into a square the size of a Starburst. D28 is a hearty helping of precision-cut, 100% acetate with “Izquierda” and “Derecha” laser-etched across the top if you forget which side is left and which is right.

products.title: NOLA | Reading Glasses
products.description: See Big. Easy. These frames can be your dixie chicken or your Tennessee lamb. They feature a vintage, square custom metal alloy frame design and shape for a clean, classic feel and an aesthetic that mimics the vibe of the city they represent. A custom top brow bar is etched with 29° 57' 26" N 90° 03' 54" W.

products.description: No flaws. Just features. With its subtle metal details and soft temple curves, Wabi Sabi complements smile lines, frayed edges, and mismatched socks. It isn’t anti-aesthetic, it just knows that real beauty lies in signs of life.

products.title: D28 Compact | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Hits you like a ton of bricks. For those fans of substance, this frame will not fold four different ways into a square the size of a Starburst. D28 is a hearty helping of precision-cut, 100% acetate with “Izquierda” and “Derecha” laser-etched across the top if you forget which side is left and which is right.

products.title: Mabuhay Compact | Prescription Light Responsive Progressive Sunglasses
products.description: Whatever happened at the Fab Mab stayed at the Fab Mab. The Mabuhay is a classic wire frame aviator design. We have added rubber texture to the temple tips to secure these frames to your face in times of gravitational diversity. The lens has a slight color tint, depending on which model you can’t live without.

products.title: Jockamo | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Like a Fat Tuesday parade through the French Quarter. These Bourbon street specials feature a classic orbital and front frame shape with a deep “U” cut nasal area to keep them securely in place. The custom metal alloy embellishments on the frame and temple front give Jockamo its classic, vintage aesthetic – as do the metal temple tips.

products.title: Miklos | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Track One from our greatest hits album. People with larger faces like the thickness and solid feel of Miklos. Customers with smaller faces like wearing a frame that stands out. Engraved over the left eye is “Port,” and over the right eye is “Starboard.” It’s a boat thing. Not a yacht thing.

products.title: Dohbro | Reading Glasses
products.description: Just duet. It could’ve been a train wreck. Or it could’ve been fine, but failed to transcend “two performances in one piece.” Dohbro is an interplay of traditional aesthetic and edgier-than-average geometry. And the sum is hall-of-fame greatness.

Engraved over the left eye is “Port,” and over the right eye is “Starboard.” It’s a boat thing. Not a yacht thing.

products.title: Tectonic | Reading Glasses
products.description: Prototype discovered on a shelf between Literature and Geography. People like to call you professor or maybe you just wish they did. Try making it a thing yourself and see where it goes, and keep feeding that head with trivial knowledge and you could earn a major award. Or you could just wear smart-looking, round Tectonics and make up your own title.

products.title: Hooper | Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: Last seen in a gas line in 1973. Hooper is a lightweight frame design that slides on like sand through the hourglass. Choose the perfect lens tint for jumping cars over river gorges…but to be clear, that has nothing to do with the naming of this product.

products.title: Hooper | Reading Glasses
products.description: Last seen in a gas line in 1973. Hooper is a lightweight frame design that slides on like sand through the hourglass. Choose the perfect lens tint for jumping cars over river gorges…but to be clear, that has nothing to do with the naming of this product.

products.title: Neta | Reading Glasses
products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: Neta | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Dazed and bemused. Neta is an aviator-style frame made from bio-based, high-density acetate with soft, rectangular orbitals, and a punch-through nose bridge with integrated acetate nose pads. 5-barrel industrial hinges are built to withstand over 25,000 flex cycles. Temples are tapered to feature the full-wrap, custom alloy temple caps, and temple cores are made of metal alloy for adjustability.

products.title: Mister Cartoon | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Liquor store glasses meet custom cruiser skirts on classic cars. Mister Cartoon is part of our Caddis collaboration series with world-renowned tattoo and airbrush artist, Mister Cartoon. Mister Cartoon's work is showcased on the likes of Beyonce, Snoop Dog, Eminem, classic lowriders and select products.

products.title: Bandit | Reading Glasses
products.description: For the money, for the glory, and for the fun…mostly for the money. There was no waiting for home video. Sitting in a theater with sticky floors and a vintage gum collection under the seat along with everyone else was the only option. Bandit features custom metal alloy throughout with acetate orbitals, a laser-welded double nose bridge, hypoallergenic polypropylene temple tips and heavy-duty hinge

products.title: Mabuhay Compact | Reading Glasses
products.description: Whatever happened at the Fab Mab stayed at the Fab Mab. The Mabuhay is a classic wire frame aviator design. We have added rubber texture to the temple tips to secure these frames to your face in times of gravitational diversity. The lens has a slight color tint, depending on which model you can’t live without.

products.title: Metamodernist Scout | Progressive Glasses

products.title: Miklos | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Track One from our greatest hits album. People with larger faces like the thickness and solid feel of Miklos. Customers with smaller faces like wearing a frame that stands out. Engraved over the left eye is “Port,” and over the right eye is “Starboard.” It’s a boat thing. Not a yacht thing.

products.title: Hooper | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Last seen in a gas line in 1973. Hooper is a lightweight frame design that slides on like sand through the hourglass. Choose the perfect lens tint for jumping cars over river gorges…but to be clear, that has nothing to do with the naming of this product.

products.title: Jockamo | Progressive Glasses
products.description: Like a Fat Tuesday parade through the French Quarter. These Bourbon street specials feature a classic orbital and front frame shape with a deep “U” cut nasal area to keep them securely in place. The custom metal alloy embellishments on the frame and temple front give Jockamo its classic, vintage aesthetic – as do the metal temple tips.

products.title: Root Cause Analysis | Progressive Glasses
products.description: See the evidence-based data forest through the systematic trees. The Root Cause Analysis is a high-density acetate frame, which means it’s created from the good, expensive stuff. The time-tested aviator shape originates back to a date that the Internet is just not letting up that easily…but trust us when we say, “timeless.”
